context: Tests whether the agent creates a properly structured Magento 2 module with correct module skeleton files, service contracts in the Api/ directory, Model/ResourceModel layers, DI configuration with interface-to-implementation bindings, and declarative database schema — following Magento 2 conventions throughout.

checklist.name: Module directory location
checklist.description: Module files are placed under app/code/<Vendor>/<Module>/ (not in vendor/ or any other location)

checklist.name: registration.php uses ComponentRegistrar
checklist.description: registration.php calls ComponentRegistrar::register() with ComponentRegistrar::MODULE, a 'Vendor_Module' string, and __DIR__

checklist.name: module.xml has sequence node
checklist.description: etc/module.xml contains a <sequence> element listing at least one dependent module (e.g., Magento_Customer or similar)

checklist.name: Data interface in Api/Data/
checklist.description: An interface file exists under Api/Data/ defining getter/setter methods for the entity's fields

checklist.name: Repository interface in Api/
checklist.description: A repository interface exists under Api/ with at minimum getById(), save(), delete(), and getList() method signatures

checklist.name: Model extends AbstractModel
checklist.description: The Model class extends Magento\Framework\Model\AbstractModel and implements the data interface

checklist.name: Model _construct calls _init
checklist.description: The Model class has a _construct() method that calls $this->_init() passing the ResourceModel class name

checklist.name: ResourceModel extends AbstractDb
checklist.description: The ResourceModel class extends Magento\Framework\Model\ResourceModel\Db\AbstractDb with _construct() calling _init() with table name and primary key

checklist.name: DI preferences in di.xml
checklist.description: etc/di.xml contains <preference> elements binding both the data interface and repository interface to their concrete implementations

checklist.name: Declarative schema file
checklist.description: etc/db_schema.xml exists and defines the custom table with columns, a primary key constraint, and uses the Magento declarative schema XSD

checklist.name: No Object Manager direct usage
checklist.description: No PHP file contains ObjectManager::getInstance() or direct instantiation via the Object Manager; all dependencies are injected via constructor

checklist.name: declare(strict_types=1) in PHP files
checklist.description: Every PHP file begins with declare(strict_types=1) immediately after the opening <?php tag

checklist.name: setup:di:compile in setup notes
checklist.description: setup-notes.md includes the command bin/magento setup:di:compile

checklist.name: generate-whitelist in setup notes
checklist.description: setup-notes.md includes the command bin/magento setup:db-declaration:generate-whitelist

checklist.name: Constructor DI throughout
checklist.description: Repository class receives ResourceModel, Factory, and SearchResultsInterfaceFactory via constructor parameters, not created inline
